Every story. Every angle.

Everyone's on the Spectrum

Wednesday, March 11, 2026
How we cover every story

Facts first — then all four perspectives.

↑ Big Government / Social Control
Big Gov. Left
Equality via state + enforced progressive rules
Bernie SandersLongtime advocate for heavy government role in healthcare, wealth taxes, worker rights, and economic redistribution.Alexandria Ocasio-CortezPushes aggressive government programs (Green New Deal, Medicare for All, wealth taxes) and regulatory oversight to achieve equality.Elizabeth WarrenStrong on economic regulation, breaking up big tech/banks, consumer protection, and progressive taxation.
Big Gov. Right
Markets + tradition via enforced rules
Donald TrumpProtectionist tariffs, massive military/immigration enforcement, tax cuts for markets, and traditionalist social stances.Mike PenceClassic social conservative with strong government enforcement on abortion/religious liberty, plus pro-business deregulation.Ted CruzAdvocates tough border security, law-and-order, and government-backed traditional values, while supporting free-market tax policies.
← Economic EqualityFree Markets →
Libertarian Left
Freedom + equality
Rashida TlaibStrong on personal freedoms (civil liberties, anti-war) while pushing socialist-leaning economic policies and distrust of big institutions.Cori BushEmphasizes grassroots equality, anti-police militarization, and economic justice without heavy top-down authoritarianism.Jill SteinAdvocates decentralized, anti-corporate economics with strong personal freedoms — anti-surveillance, drug decriminalization, civil rights.
Libertarian Right
Freedom + free markets
Rand PaulConsistent on civil liberties (anti-Patriot Act, criminal justice reform), ending foreign wars, and free-market economics with low taxes/regulation.Ron PaulIcon of this quadrant: gold standard advocacy, non-interventionism, drug legalization, and extreme deregulation.Justin AmashStrong on personal freedoms (privacy, free speech) and laissez-faire economics; left Republican party to become independent/Libertarian.
↓ Personal Freedom / Live & Let Live
